ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-07-2016 Continued To Jun-21-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-30-2016 Sustained
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is sustained with twenty days leave to amend to give the plaintiff the opportunity, if she can do so in good faith, to allege one or more non-time barred claims entitling her to relief. ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976 (302/HK)
